name: Car Meet Messages
messages: Burger Grill is firing up fresh burgers all day — grab one near the Show Arena.
Cool down at the Ice Cream Van — classic 99s and slushies ready to go.
Main Bar Tent pouring cold pints and ciders — perfect pit stop between shows.
Merch Tent has limited‑run event tees and stickers — once they’re gone, they’re gone.
Auto Parts Stall has show‑day discounts on filters, fluids, and accessories.
Detailing Products Stall running live demos — get your shine on.
Kids Fairground Stall open all day — games, prizes, and family fun.
Performance Tuning Co. offering event‑only deals — don’t miss their stand.
Alloy Wheel Specialists showcasing custom finishes — check out their latest sets.
Car Care Pro running detailing tips every hour — swing by for pro advice.
Stay hydrated — water stations north and south of the arena.
Need help? Medical Point and Security HQ are both near the main arena.
Classic Car Parade at 11AM — get a good spot early.
Best Modified Competition at 1PM — come support your favourites.
Rev‑Off Challenge at 3PM — loudest engines win.
Performance Tuning Co. will be at Milton Keynes Auto Expo next month — catch them there.
Alloy Wheel Specialists heading to Bedford Motor Show soon — go say hi.
Car Care Pro’s next stop is the Luton Summer Shine Meet — don’t miss their stand.
Charge your phone when you can — you’ll want pics of today.
Enjoy the day, look after each other, and keep the engines singing.
